Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a Solutions Architect, I need to have an Application Architecture Document (AAD) describing the target application at a conceptual level that identifies the Requirements, Application Services, Application Interfaces, Data Objects, and Technology Services, so that I can build the Tracking App mobile application to realize the identified requirements and design principles and constraints.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Develop the Application Component context diagram

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Application Services catalog for the Tracking App

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Data Objects catalog for incoming and outgoing data

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Application Interfaces in which integrations with other applications will take place

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Technology Services catalog for the Tracking App

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Application Component focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Application Requirements focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Application Services focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Application Interfaces focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Data Objects focused metamodels

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Technology Services focused metamodels

Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a lead Enterprise Architect, I need to define the proper guidelines and processes for creating, modifying, and deleting artifacts from the enterprise architecture repository, so that every other contributing architect including myself can follow them to maintain the integrity and consistency of all EA artifacts.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the process of an EA artifact creation

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the process of an EA artifact modification

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the process of an EA artifact deletion

Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a CTO, I need to have a list of all the technology assets in the enterprise, know what they provide, and identify what application uses what asset, so that I can identify the redundant services and know the impact of replacing or retiring some of these assets.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Technology Nodes to Technology Services matrix

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the Application Components to Technology Services matrix

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Technology Node focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Technology Service focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Application Component focused metamodel

Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a CTO, I need to have a list of the duplicated services, services that are no longer being used, and the possible impact of deprecating, merging, or replacing the technology assets that provide them, so that I can create an action plan for implementing the changes.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the duplicated Technology Services catalog

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the unused Technology Services catalog

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the To-Be Technology Services catalog

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the To-Be Technology Nodes catalog

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Define the To-Be Application Components to Technology Services matrix

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Work Package focused metamodel

Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a CEO, I need a model that shows what do we need to be able to provide the online shopping service to customers, so that I can identify the required changes to make.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build and develop the To-Be Business Capability Model for the online shopping Business Service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the To-Be Business Actors catalog that defines what human resources are needed for providing the service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the To-Be Business Processes catalog that defines how the new services will be provided

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the To-Be Application Services catalog that defines the required application services

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the To-Be Data Entities catalog that defines the required data and information

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the To-Be Technology Services catalog that defines the required technology services

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Business Capability focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Business Service focused metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Business Actor focuses metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Business Process focuses metamodel

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Data Entity focused metamodel

Column.name: Note
Column.value: As a CEO, I need to know what is the closest existing service to the new one and what are its components, so that I can identify what can be reused and what actions need to be taken.

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Business Capability Model for the selected Business Service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Business Actors catalog that defines what human resources currently provide the current service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Business Processes catalog that defines how the current services is provided

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Application Services catalog that defines what application services support the current business service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Data Entities catalog that defines the data and information that are required for currently providing the service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the As-Is Technology Services catalog that defines what technology services support the current business service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the Gaps catalog between the As-Is and To-Be models

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Identify the Course of Actions catalog to define required actions to take to be able to provide the new service

Column.name: Name
Column.value: Build the Course of Actions focused metamodel
